headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never center-align unless specifically needed for symmetry. Use for dashboard titles, column headers, and major section titles.

body.usage_rules: Highly legible, tracking-normal. Use for all task details, descriptions, and UI labels.

labels.usage_rules: Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] for overlines and tiny metadata (e.g., tags, column headers).

colors.rules: Tinted Grey Rule applied (using Zinc palette which has a very subtle cool undertone). Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Hover states must explicitly set text color.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - High density, strict hierarchy, every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Collapsible left sidebar for navigation. 1px right border (border-zinc-800).
layout_and_spacing.topbar: Sticky top bar with search, user profile, notifications. Solid background with bottom border (border-zinc-800).
layout_and_spacing.kanban_board: Full height columns. Columns must stretch to fill vertical space. Use flex-col and flex-grow for inner lists.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-4, p-6, p-8 for containers. Internal card spacing p-4. Grid gaps: gap-4 or gap-6 for dashboard widgets.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align by default for readability. Optical alignment for icons within buttons.

cards.kanban_ticket: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), rounded-md. NO shadow by default. Hover: border-zinc-600, slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]), shadow-lg.
cards.dashboard_widget: Grid Borders strategy. Flat surfaces, simple 1px borders (border-zinc-800).

buttons.primary: Solid white (bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950), crisp edges (rounded-md). Hover: bg-zinc-200.
buttons.ghost: Transparent background, text-zinc-400. Hover: bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-50.

inputs.default: Shadcn default, bg-zinc-950, border-zinc-800, text-zinc-50. Focus: ring-1 ring-zinc-50 border-zinc-50.

badges.priority: Subtle background with high contrast text (e.g., bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20) for elegant visibility.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a visible hover state. Usually a background lighten or border highlight.
motion_and_interactions.drag_and_drop: Kanban cards must scale slightly (scale-105) and gain a drop-shadow-2xl when dragging. Columns must highlight (e.g., bg-zinc-900/50) when a card is dragged over them.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease.

icons.usage: Use 16px (w-4 h-4) for inline icons, 20px (w-5 h-5) for sidebar navigation. Always stroke-width 1.5 or 2.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Format: kebab-case, role-based. E.g., data-testid='add-task-button'.

images.description: Abstract black curved shapes on black background, perfect for the login/register screen split layout.
Close-up portrait of a young man, use for dummy task assignees or current user profile.
Close-up portrait of a serious businessman, use for dummy task assignees.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React Dashboard with a left sidebar and main content area.
Implement the Kanban board drag and drop functionality.
Ensure the theme is purely dark mode by default, following the color palette specified. Do not use generic blue or purple defaults.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to remove the 'default Vercel look'. Use flat borders and no shadows for default card states.
Implement data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as requested.
Use Manrope for all headings and Inter for body text. Ensure they are imported correctly in the global CSS.
The Auth page should have a split layout using the provided auth_background image on one side.
